resources.string: Find duplicate photos, blurry shots, screenshots, and large videos. Nothing is deleted without your confirmation.
See what is wasting space before any upgrade prompt.
You choose what stays and what gets cleaned.
The app asks only for media access needed to find storage waste.
The app can scan your full photo and video library for storage waste.
The app can scan only the photos and videos you selected. Full access finds more cleanup opportunities.
Android may ask you to allow photos and videos after you tap the button.
Ready to scan. You still review everything before deleting.
Limited access is safe, but full access gives a better cleanup scan.
Android may ask you to allow photos and videos next.
